title: Super Admin — Product Configuration
subtitle: Named profiles, module overrides, legacy global slices, and system audit logs. Normal Admin cannot open this page.

account.title: Super Admin Account
account.subtitle: Unrestricted system access
account.hint_before: Normal Admin cannot open this page. Change password under

deployment.lic_info: Hospital-wide deployment mode and named profiles are managed through solution subscriptions. Admin or Director requests a module, you issue a serial in the ZAIZENS License Generator, and the hospital activates it. Manual profile/mode changes on this page are disabled.
deployment.no_active_subs: No active subscriptions yet. Staff menus stay locked until a solution is activated.
deployment.license_gen: License Generator: run npm start in license-generator/ (default http://localhost:5055).
deployment.profiles_active_info: Named profiles are active below ({{names}}). Pick a single mode here and click Apply to switch to one legacy preset instead.
deployment.legacy_hint: Quick single preset for the whole hospital. Super Admin always sees the full menu. For combining modules (e.g. Clinical + Payroll), use named profiles below.
deployment.named_hint: Select one or more profiles, then Activate selected. End-user menus combine all chosen bundles (e.g. HMS + Payroll shows both clinical and HR items). Deployment limits still apply before per-role navigation grants.
deployment.no_profiles_db: No profiles in database — refresh the page to seed defaults.
deployment.switch_legacy: Switch back to single hospital-wide mode above
deployment.select_one_profile: Select at least one deployment profile.
deployment.legacy_named_hint: Usually use “Hospital-wide deployment mode” above and click Apply. Named profiles are for saved presets with per-profile module overrides. Activate profile on a row below switches away from legacy mode — the first row is often Full Suite, which will look like your selection “reset”.
deployment.no_named_profiles: No named profiles in the database yet. They are created automatically on this page load; refresh if the table is empty.
deployment.activate_confirm: Activate named profile "{{name}}"? This replaces legacy global mode.
deployment.switch_legacy: Switch back to legacy global mode

facility.add_subtitle: Register a new facility for multi-site operations.
facility.code_locked: Code cannot be changed after creation.

deployModules.title: Module overrides — {{name}}
deployModules.legacy_desc: legacy_modules_json on tbl_app_settings — applies when legacy global deployment is active (no named profile). Overrides hospital-wide nav and route guard for all users except Super Admin.
deployModules.profile_desc: Per-profile modules_json overrides hospital-wide nav and route guard (all users except Super Admin). Inherit follows deployment slices; Force show/hide overrides slice rules for that nav code.
deployModules.named_warning: A named deployment profile is currently active. Overrides saved here take effect after you switch to legacy global mode (or check the option below when saving).
deployModules.switch_legacy_after: Switch to legacy global mode after save
deployModules.clear_confirm_legacy: Clear all module overrides for legacy global mode?
deployModules.clear_confirm_profile: Clear all module overrides for this profile?
